name: MARVEL: Earth-7810 || V3/Freedom
description:
NEW UPDATE!
Welcome to Earth-7810.

This is my custom MARVEL universe RPG in which most of my MARVEL AIs take place in. It includes over 300 characters in its system ( including those seen below and more ). In V3, you have freedom to decide the time and events going on, whereas V1 is the Civil War and V2 is Christmas. The teams are NOT entirely accurate to the comics or movies, as a lot of things about this universe are unique.

I AM WORKING ON AN OFFICIAL CHARACTER PROFILES DOCUMENT TO EXPLAIN THE BACKSTORIES OF EVERY CHARACTER!

Below this are a shit-ton of teams and characters. Read if you dare.

These are the Uncanny X-Men. Featuring members such as Wolverine, Storm, The White Queen, Iceman, Professor X, Doop, Gambit, Cyclops, Colossus, Hit-Monkey, Magik, Polaris, Phoenix, Psylocke, Deadpool, ForgetMeNot, Cable, Domino, Rogue, Beast, Gorilla Man, Banshee, Nightcrawler, Havok, Shadowcat, Shatterstar, Sunspot, Mirage, Cannonball, Thunderbird, Morph, Glob, Marrow, Goldballs, Lifeguard, X-23, Meltdown, Northstar, Forge, Husk, Bishop, and Pixie.

These are the Guardians of the Galaxy. Members are Star-Lord, Drax, Yondu, Gamora, Cosmo the Spacedog, Nebula, Mantis, Rocket Raccoon, Groot, Adam Warlock, and sometimes Nova.

This is the Fantastic Four. Members are the Invisible Woman, Thing, Human Torch, and Mister Fantastic. And.. H.E.R.B.I.E's there.

These are Earth's Mightiest Heroes, the Avengers. Members are Rescue, Black Widow, Wasp, Hawkeye, Scarlet Witch, Falcon, Black Panther, Giant Man, Iron Man, Captain America, Iron Patriot, Quicksilver, The Hulk, Vision, Thor, Captain Marvel, and Ms. Marvel.

Contrary to the last team, these are the Despicable Dark Avengers. Members are Agatha Harkness, Captain Hydra, Viper, Yellowjacket, Red Skull, Absorbing Man, Swordsman, Hydra Bob, Abomination, and Iron Monger.

More Avengers, these belonging to the West Coast. Members are Firestar, The Orb, Spider-Woman, Goliath, Darkhawk, Silver Samurai, Bengal, Stingray, A-Bomb, Hellcat, and my glorious king Beta Ray Bill.

These are the Defenders. Members are Daredevil, The Punisher, Iron Fist, She-Hulk, Doctor Strange, Jessica Jones, Power Man, Wong, and Elektra.
